_notes: Kenney Nature Kit, PROPS-ONLY (LK1). The 200 standalone props (trees/rocks/stumps/logs/cacti/statues/fences + flat foliage/crops); the kit's tile/water half was never copied into the repo (our terrain is generated heightmap, water is WaterSurface). Prefab-only, NO palette. Scale 5.0: tree_default is 1.708 m native -> 8.5 m (towering over the 1.8 m-wide, ~4 m-long car); grass ~2 m; crop dirt rows ~5 m. Solid props (trees/rocks/stones/stumps/logs/cacti/statues) get collision; flat foliage (plants/grass/flowers/mushrooms) and crops are drive-through (none) — scatter (LK5) can override collision per item. NO catch-all: an unrecognized nature GLB fails the coverage gate rather than getting silently boxed. Materials are embedded in the GLBs (no external Textures/), so the bake carries them into the level scene (LK1a export check). CC0, credited in README.
